name: Brest Region (Belarus)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic banner of the regional arms

description: A blue field bearing the arms of Brest Region: a golden aurochs (European bison) on a red heraldic banner with a crenellated top.
history: Brest Region (Brest Voblast) is one of the six regions of Belarus, bordering Poland and Ukraine and centred on the city of Brest. Its flag, a blue field charged with the regional arms, was adopted in 2004; the golden aurochs is a long-standing heraldic emblem of the Brest area.

features.role: Arms of Brest Region - a golden aurochs on a red heraldic banner
